hero.headline: Farm With Confidence
hero.subtext: Professional agricultural consulting and training services for farmers across Ethiopia.

about.title: Who We Are
about.body: Agro Consulting P.L.C was established in 2021 by veterinary physicians with extensive experience in medium and large farms. Our organization is a multidisciplinary agricultural consulting business with operations across Ethiopia, founded in Bishoftu City.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive agricultural solutions for every farming level.

values.title: Core Values
values.respectDesc: Showing respect to prior generations and learning from them.
values.humilityDesc: Being confident yet humble in our approach to every client.
values.empowermentDesc: Encouraging the youth to realize their potential for national development.
values.compassionDesc: Demonstrating love and compassion for the next generation of farmers.
